Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant Default Pursuant To 585(D); Declaration Of Angela A. Velen; Declaration Of Vince Monard In Support Thereof; Declaration Re: Attorney'S Fees;
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar May-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICK BOVIS' Motion To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Bovis's motion to set aside the default entered against him on May 12, 2020 is granted.

Although defendant shows that Bovis was personally served with the summons and complaint on April 2, 2020, under the general orders of the Court issued during the COVID-19 emergency, the period from March 18, 2020 to June 1, 2020 were deemed court holidays for purposes of computing time for filing papers with the court, including the time to answer or otherwise respond to a complaint. Accordingly, Defendant's responsive pleading was not yet due on May 12, 2020, and it was an error for his default to be entered.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
